summary: Iteration 10 Testing Complete - Live Streaming Tip/Donate feature fully functional. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components tested and working. Fixed bug in /api/live/tips/{stream_id} endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in GET /api/live/tips/{stream_id}: MongoDB projection returning empty dict when tips/tips_total fields don't exist. Added stream_id to projection to ensure document is found.
Tip presets correctly defined: Points (10, 25, 50, 100 pts), Card ($0.99, $1.99, $2.99, $4.99)
Points deduction and credit working correctly between tipper and broadcaster
Stripe checkout integration working for card tips
Webhook handler correctly processes purchase_type=tip and credits broadcaster
Tip animation CSS keyframes (tipSlideIn, tipFadeOut) present in LivePage.js
Tip notification overlay visible in both broadcaster and viewer views
seed_data_creation: Free user points set to 50 for testing tip functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tip/Donate feature fully tested: 1) GET /api/live/tip-presets returns points (10,25,50,100) and card ($0.99,$1.99,$2.99,$4.99) presets. 2) POST /api/live/tip/{stream_id} sends points tip - deducts from tipper, credits broadcaster. 3) POST /api/live/tip-card/{stream_id} creates Stripe checkout. 4) GET /api/live/tips/{stream_id} returns tips for stream. 5) GET /api/live/my-tips-received returns broadcaster's received tips. 6) Self-tipping blocked, invalid amounts rejected, insufficient points rejected. 7) Frontend: Tip button (star icon) in viewer view, tip menu with points and card options, tip animations working.

tip_presets_endpoint.notes: Returns points_tips (10,25,50,100 pts with emojis) and card_tips ($0.99,$1.99,$2.99,$4.99 with pack_ids)

points_tip.notes: Deducts points from tipper, credits broadcaster, logs tip, broadcasts via WebSocket

card_tip.notes: Creates Stripe checkout session with tip metadata

stream_tips.notes: Fixed projection bug - now returns tips array and tips_total

my_tips_received.notes: Returns broadcaster's received tips with total

tip_validations.notes: Self-tipping blocked (400), invalid amounts rejected (400), insufficient points rejected (400), ended stream rejected (400)

webhook_tip_handling.notes: purchase_type=tip in webhook credits broadcaster with points equivalent (1 cent = 0.5 pts)

frontend_tip_button.notes: Star icon button in viewer view bottom-right

frontend_tip_menu.notes: Popup with 'Send a Tip' header, points options (10,25,50,100), card options ($0.99-$4.99)

frontend_tip_animations.notes: CSS keyframes tipSlideIn and tipFadeOut present, tip notifications overlay in video container

sidebar_live_link.notes: Live link with NEW badge in sidebar

bug_fixed.issue: MongoDB projection {tips: 1, tips_total: 1} returned empty dict {} when fields don't exist, causing 'Stream not found' error
bug_fixed.fix: Added stream_id to projection to ensure document is found even when tips fields don't exist
